Product category

Paper Party Accessories and Cupcake Decorations

Cupcake toppers, paper doilies, cake boards, themed cups, straws, plates, and disposable tableware sets.

Request Quote Get Free Sample

Materials and features

Buyer-ready product information

Material: Food grade paper, kraft paper, foil paper, and decorative paper.

  • Birthday themes
  • Seasonal themes
  • Mixed party sets
  • Custom patterns
  • Retail pack support

Applications

Common B2B use cases

  • Party brands
  • Online retailers

Specifications

Visible specifications for buyers and search engines

These specification rows are written as HTML text so procurement teams, search engines and AI answer systems can read them directly.

Party accessories are selected by theme, shape, color and pack configuration. Send target product photos or a mood board for matching options.

OEM / ODM

Custom design, sampling and bulk cartons

LANGMAI supports size selection, pattern design, color matching, custom packaging and production confirmation for overseas buyers.

  1. Confirm product and size
  2. Send artwork or select stock design
  3. Approve sample and packaging
  4. Start mass production and inspection

Thank you. Our sales team will contact you soon. Static demo note: connect this form to wh1007209170@gmail.com before launch.

FAQ

Paper Party Accessories and Cupcake Decorations FAQ

What material is used for Paper Party Accessories and Cupcake Decorations?

Food grade paper, kraft paper, foil paper, and decorative paper. The catalog highlights food grade materials and export-friendly paper product options.

Can LANGMAI make custom printed designs?

Yes. Custom colors, sizes, stock designs and OEM artwork are supported. Buyers should confirm artwork, size, packaging and sample approval before mass production.

Which certificates should buyers confirm?

The updated brief highlights FSC, EUDR and BRC. Public certificate scans should be added after approval from the factory team.

How do I request a quote?

Send product type, size, quantity, target market, custom print needs, email and WhatsApp through the inquiry form.
